title: Journal Evidence
description: Structured evidence extracted from a journal turn by journal_nlp_pre_interpreter. This schema describes the NLP output that passes through the processing pipeline. Entity names are hashed before this structure is produced; the raw input text is never stored in this schema.

entity_mentions.description: Map of entity_hash to per-entity affect deltas. Keys are opaque hashes (Entity_XXXX format). Values contain context-local valence/arousal signals derived from the entity's surrounding text.

sva_direct.description: Aggregate salience-valence-arousal scores for the turn as a whole, independent of any specific entity.

entity_count.description: Number of distinct entities detected in this turn.

valence_delta.description: Valence signal for this entity's local context (-1=negative, +1=positive).

arousal_delta.description: Arousal signal derived from sentence-level energy around this entity.

salience.description: Overall topic salience — proxy for how much the turn focuses on interpersonal content.

valence.description: Turn-level valence derived from keyword sentiment analysis.

arousal.description: Turn-level arousal derived from capitalisation, punctuation density, and fragmentation.
